_note: Top 50 target companies for job discovery watchlist. All careers_url values are verified reachable (HTTP 200). scrape_method=direct means we hit careers_url directly. scrape_method=linkedin means the careers page blocks scrapers — use the linkedin_slug for company page jobs instead.

top_global_product.label: Top global product companies (strong India GCC)

companies.name: Google
companies.why: Google Research India, DeepMind India, YouTube, Maps, Ads ML teams

companies.name: Microsoft
companies.why: Azure AI, Bing, GitHub Copilot, Research India — large ML presence

companies.why: AWS AI/ML, Alexa, Amazon Science, Ads ML — largest India headcount in MAANG

companies.why: FAIR India, Ads ML, Instagram ranking, WhatsApp infra

companies.why: Siri, on-device ML, CoreML — smaller India team, very high pay

companies.why: Recommendations, content intelligence — small India team, very high pay
